name: Tomato- Salami Quiche
recipeIngredient: 2 cups diced tomatoes, seeded and well drained
1/4 pound hard salami, cut into small pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Bake the pie shell for 8 minutes at 450 degrees after pricking the bottom with a fork. Remove from oven and set aside.
2. Prepare the cheese, salami, and chopped tomatoes. Ensure all excess liquid is drained from tomatoes.
3. In the pre-baked pie shell, sprinkle half the cheese, salami, and tomatoes.
4. Repeat layers with remaining ingredients.
5. Scatter sliced onions evenly over the top.
6. In a small bowl, beat together eggs, milk, parsley, oregano, and garlic salt. Pour mixture evenly over the ingredients in the pie shell.
7. Sprinkle Parmesan cheese on top, if desired.
8. Return quiche to 450 degree oven and bake for 10 minutes.
9. Reduce temperature to 325 degrees and bake for 30 to 35 minutes.
10. Let stand 5 minutes before cutting and serving.
